profile_source: Generic Jamaica Blue Mountain STYLE profile (smooth, brown sugar, cocoa, mild floral, light-medium body) cross-referenced from Coffee Bean Direct / espresso-coffee-guide. IMPORTANT: this is a Blue Mountain-STYLE blend, NOT authentic Jamaica Blue Mountain. The Bean Coffee Company's specific listing/ASIN not confidently confirmed -> amazon_asin BACKFILL; flavor notes are style-typical, not verified for this exact SKU. Verified 2026-06-13.

name: Volcanica Kona Coffee Extra Fancy

comparison_anchors.product: Koa Coffee Estate Kona Medium Roast

profile_source: Volcanica listing + Amazon (B0030IEZUA): Extra Fancy 100% Kona, silky buttery body, floral (jasmine), caramel undertones, bright citrus/tart cherry, light acidity, nutty finish. Roasted in Atlanta. Verified 2026-06-13.

name: Volcanica Jamaican Blue Mountain Blend
origin: Jamaica Blue Mountain blend (30% JBM, 70% mountain-grown)

comparison_anchors.product: The Bean Coffee Company Jamaica Blue Mountain Style

profile_source: Volcanica listing + Amazon (B0030LRUCW): medium roast, brown sugar, star anise, cocoa, creamy sweetness, light acidity. NOTE: this is the Volcanica JBM BLEND (30% Jamaica Blue Mountain, 70% other mountain-grown; the only blend approved by the Jamaican Coffee Board), NOT 100% JBM. Verified 2026-06-13.

name: Volcanica House Blend
profile_source: Volcanica listing + Amazon (B0030LIKUI): medium roast South and Central American blend, chocolate notes, sweet yet bold, balanced acidity, clean, full body. Mycotoxin/mold tested. Verified 2026-06-13.

name: Fresh Roasted Coffee Organic Ethiopian Sidamo Guji
profile_source: Fresh Roasted Coffee listing + Amazon/Walmart: natural-process Ethiopian heirloom, fruit-forward (strawberry, blueberry, cherry), wine-like, bright, earthy finish, organic. Light roast. Amazon SKU labeled 'Sidamo' vs 'Guji' inconsistently -> ASIN BACKFILL. Verified 2026-06-13.
